# Conforcus

> Conforcus (Conforcus Bilişim Danışmanlık A.Ş.) is a SAP consultancy delivering deep
> expertise across SAP support (AMS), S/4HANA transformations, global rollout, and 48+
> ready-made SAP solutions. 130+ active clients, 50+ countries, 30+ industries, 70+
> consultants, 95% client retention. Headquartered in Ataşehir, İstanbul, Türkiye.
> Tagline: "Deep Expertise. Smart Solutions. Lasting Trust." Default language Turkish (/),
> English under /en/.

## Services
- SAP Support Services (AMS): SLA-backed continuous maintenance, issue resolution and improvement for live SAP systems.
- S/4HANA Transformations: greenfield, brownfield, cloud and on-premise conversions with a proven methodology.
- Global Rollout: corporate SAP template deployment across 50+ countries with full local compliance and IFRS-aligned localization.
- Product & Solution Development: custom builds with ABAP, Fiori and SAP BTP/cloud, plus 48+ ready-made solution packages.

## Confiq — AI Product Family
- Confiq Decode: ask SAP in plain language, get answers in seconds.
- Confiq Predict: 3–6 months of foresight in cash flow and financial risk.
- Confiq Cortex: decision intelligence uniting questions and foresight.
- Confiq Bridge: smart cross-module data flow and automation.
- Confiq Scan (FREE): comprehensive SAP system analysis and risk map within 48 hours.
